title: Noun を前提として
titleEn: Used to express 'on the assumption of', 'based on'.
explanation: Used to express 'on the assumption of', 'based on'. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The grammar point 'Noun を前提として' is used to convey that something is done based on or assuming something else. It indicates a preconceived condition or assumption on which the following action or plan relies.

title: Noun を前提にして
titleEn: Assuming; presupposing; on the assumption of.
explanation: Assuming; presupposing; on the assumption of. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The grammar point 'Noun を前提にして' is used to show that something is done assuming or presupposing the noun that comes before it. In English, it can be translated as 'on the assumption of', 'assuming', or 'presupposing'.

title: Noun を境にして
titleEn: Means 'as a turning point', 'since (time)', or 'from (time) on'.
explanation: Means 'as a turning point', 'since (time)', or 'from (time) on'. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The grammar point 'Noun を境にして' is used to indicate a significant change or turning point marked by a specific event or time. It means that after this boundary, some situation changes or a new state begins.

title: Noun を機にして
titleEn: To take the opportunity to; taking the occasion to; on the occasion of.
explanation: To take the opportunity to; taking the occasion to; on the occasion of. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The grammar pattern 'Noun を機にして' expresses the idea of using a certain event or situation as an opportunity to do something else. It is often used when some change or new step is taken as a result of a specific event.

title: Noun を皮切りに / を皮切りにして
titleEn: Used to indicate the starting point of some series of events or actions; 'starting with', 'beginning with'.
structure: Noun + を皮切りに / を皮切りにして
structureEn: Noun + を皮切りに / を皮切りにして
explanation: Used to indicate the starting point of some series of events or actions; 'starting with', 'beginning with'. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The grammar point 'Noun を皮切りに / を皮切りにして' is used to convey the idea of something beginning or starting with a certain event or action. This pattern is often used when the speaker wants to highlight the starting point of a series or string of events.

title: Noun を皮切りにして
explanation: Used to express 'Starting with', 'Beginning with' (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: 'Noun を皮切りにして' is a Japanese grammatical form used when one wants to express that something begins with a certain event or action, then continues on in a sequence. It is the same as saying 'starting with...' or 'beginning with...' in English.

title: Noun を禁じ得ない
explanation: 'Cannot help but do', or 'inevitable' (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The 〜を禁じ得ない (wo kinjienai) grammar point is used to express a situation or emotion that is so strong it can't be helped or is inevitable. It is used with nouns to express an uncontrollable feeling or action.

title: Noun を経て
titleEn: Expresses the idea of 'through' or 'via'; going through some process or phase.
explanation: Expresses the idea of 'through' or 'via'; going through some process or phase. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The を経て grammar point is used to express the concept of going through some process, phase, place, or period of time as a means of achieving something or reaching some end point. It can be literally translated as 'through' or 'via' in English, and can be used both literally and metaphorically.

title: Noun を踏まえて
titleEn: Based on; taking into account; in light of
explanation: Based on; taking into account; in light of (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The verb 踏まえる (fumaeru) means 'to be based on' or 'to take into consideration'. When ～を踏まえて is connected with a noun, it implies that actions or decisions are made based on or taking into account the noun. It also expresses looking at a situation from the standpoint of the noun before proceeding to the following action.

title: Noun を限りに
titleEn: Expresses the idea of 'as of', 'with', or 'from', indicating the end of something or a point of change.
explanation: Expresses the idea of 'as of', 'with', or 'from', indicating the end of something or a point of change. (Ngu?n: Hanabira; b?n d?ch Vi?t c?n bi?n t?p.)
explanationEn: The grammar point Noun を限りに is used to indicate the end point of something or a point of change from that time onward. The noun preceding this expression usually refers to a point in time, signifying that something ends or changes starting at that point.
